# color1

**Instance Property**

The color for half of the squares in the checkerboard pattern.

## Declaration

```swift
var color1: CGColor? { get set }
```

## Discussion

This color appears in the top left square of the generated pattern, and in alternate squares thereafter.

Changing the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLCheckerboardTexture/divisions], [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLCheckerboardTexture/color1], or [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLCheckerboardTexture/color2] properties invalidates the cache, causing Model I/O to regenerate texel data the next time it is needed.

## Configuring the Checkerboard Pattern

- **color2**: The color for the other half of the squares in the checkerboard pattern.
- **divisions**: The number of squares along each dimension in the checkerboard pattern.
